name: Pregnancy Weight Gain Calculator
description: Calculate recommended weight gain during pregnancy.
seo_description: Use our free pregnancy weight gain calculator to quickly estimate min_gain, max_gain based on pre_bmi. No registration needed.
example_label: Calculate weight gain for normal BMI pregnancy.
result_context: The increase varía per IMC initial; low weight needs more gain, obesidad requires gain mínima.
steps: The calculador aplica The formula automatically and muestra results
mistakes: No Verify que pre_bmi estén in units correctas antes of Calculate
Redondear values intermedios antes of the calculation final (pierde precisión)
Apply results without Consider contexto individual or condiciones especiales
desc: Free online pregnancy weight gain calculator. Enter pre-pregnancy bmi to get instant results.
